text: tsa agent complimented my socks then made me throw away my shampoo. mixed signals bro
spent 14 hours on a bus in peru next to a guy who kept showing me photos of his ferret
the hotel said ocean view. technically the ocean was visible if you stood on the toilet
my gf and i almost broke up over google maps rerouting us through a cornfield
camping is just paying money to be homeless with extra steps
lost my luggage in frankfurt and honestly the airline owes me a new wardrobe
travel influencer said this beach was hidden gem. there were 400 people there with tripods
jet lag hit so hard i put orange juice in my cereal and didn't even notice til bowl 2
the cruise ship buffet at 2am is where you see humanity at its most honest
my airbnb host left me a 3 page note about the garbage schedule. sir this is vacation
drove 6 hours to the grand canyon and my kid said 'its just a big hole' and i felt nothing
airport carpet should not be that color. who approved this
the hostel shower had exactly two settings: ice and lava
i have been stuck in this layover for 9 hours. i now know every store in concourse B personally
tried to haggle at a market in bangkok and the lady just laughed at me for 30 seconds straight
our tent flooded at 3am and my husband said 'this builds character' and i chose violence
travel influencer: this cafe changed my life. the cafe: a starbucks with a nice wall
my flight got cancelled and they gave me a $7 meal voucher. seven dollars. at an airport
road trip day 4: we have not spoken in 200 miles and the vibes are immaculate actually
tsa pulled me aside for a pat down bc of my belt buckle. it was embarassing and thorough
the hotel pool was the size of a bathtub and somehow still closed for maintenance
got food poisoning in rome and threw up near the colosseum. when in rome i guess
cruise ship karaoke night is proof that confidence and talent are unrelated
jet lag made me cry at a commercial for dish soap. it was about a family reunion
my uber driver in cancun played baby shark the entire ride and i was too polite to say anything
camping day 2: discovered i am allergic to something out here. everything itches
the travel blogger said pack light. i brought 2 suitcases and still didnt have the right shoes
lost luggage update: its been 3 weeks. i think delta is wearing my clothes now
slept in the airport and woke up to a janitor vacuuming around me like i was furniture
road trip snack hierarchy matters more than you think. this has caused a real argument
the airbnb had a mystery stain on the ceiling that i grew emotionally attached to by day 3
saw a man in crocs and socks sprint through terminal 4 like his life depended on it. godspeed
hotel breakfast was just sadness in buffet form. the eggs were gray
my friend said lets go camping itll be fun. reader, it was not fun
cruise ship elevator music follows you into your dreams. its been 2 weeks since i got home
tsa confiscated my peanut butter. apparently its a liquid now. nothing makes sense
the rental car smelled like someone lived in it. not like briefly. like permanently
travel influencers be like 'i found this secret waterfall' and theres a parking lot right there
jet lag tip: just accept that 4am is your new personality
drove wrong way down a one way street in rome. the hand gestures i received were educational
the resort charged $18 for a watered down margarita and i paid it bc what else am i gonna do
my tent zipper broke on night one and i slept with the spiders. we are friends now
layover in dallas so long i started evaluating real estate near the airport
the hotel walls were so thin i know my neighbors full itinerary and their marital problems
packed 5 books for vacation read zero of them. stared at the ocean like a philosopher instead
cruise ship day 5: i have eaten my body weight in shrimp and regret nothing
tsa made me take off my shoes, belt, jacket, and dignity. standard procedure apparently
gps said 'turn left' into a literal river. technology wants me dead
the travel blog said this was a hidden gem. its a applebees next to a gas station
lost my passport in thailand and found it in my shoe. dont ask
road trip with my sister lasted 3 hours before we needed a mediator (rest stop wendy's employee)
camping protip: if you forget the can opener you will be eating uncooked ramen for 3 days
the guy next to me on the plane took his shoes off and i experienced true suffering
hotel minibar charged me $9 for a kit kat. i could buy the whole factory for that
jet lagged brain ordered breakfast in spanish at a hotel in japan. the waiter was very patient
travel influencer: quit your job and travel! me: i literally cannot afford this airport sandwich
cruise ship formal night and some guy showed up in cargo shorts. absolute legend
the airbnb key was hidden under a rock that looked like every other rock. took me 40 min
my flight got diverted to cleveland. nobody has ever been excited to land in cleveland
camping in the rain is just outdoor depression with s'mores
road trip playlist caused a genuine friendship-ending argument. fleetwood mac is not mid, karen
tsa precheck line was longer than regular line. the system is a lie
hotel room key stopped working 4 times in one day. front desk knows me by name now
the hostel had a rooster outside. checkout was at 11 but the rooster checked me out at 4am
travel blogger said the street food was amazing. i have not left the bathroom in 6 hours
lost my luggage and the airline gave me a toiletry kit like that fixes everything
my kid asked are we there yet 47 times. i counted. i have nothing else to do
airport sushi is a trust exercise i failed
the cruise photographer caught me mid-sneeze and tried to sell me the photo for $25
glamping is just camping for people who are honest about hating nature
rental car company gave us a minivan instead of a convertible. vacation energy destroyed
woke up in a different timezone and forgot what year it was. jet lag is time travel but bad
the infinity pool looked infinite in photos. in person it was a large puddle with a view
some dude on my flight clapped when we landed and honestly i almost joined him. it was rough
hotel concierge recommended a local restaurant. it was a tgi fridays
packed my entire medicine cabinet and only needed sunscreen. which i forgot
the campsite said bear proof containers required and suddenly camping felt very real
layover nap on airport bench changed me as a person. i understand cats now
cruise wifi cost $15/day and loaded one email per hour. digital detox by force
tsa agent asked whats in the bag and i panicked and said 'stuff' like a criminal
google maps took us through a neighborhood that google maps should not know about
the hotel gym was a treadmill from 2003 and a single dumbbell. singular
travel influencer sunset photo took 200 attempts. i watched. i was behind her in line
my airbnb had a note saying 'please talk to the plants' and honestly i did. lonely vacation
got upgraded to first class once in 2014 and ive been chasing that high ever since
road trip gas station bathroom rating: 2/10 but it had a motivational poster so 3/10
the resort kids club lost my child for 20 minutes. he was at the buffet. hes 5
flight delayed 4 hours and the gate agent looked like she had seen the end of the world
camping hammock flipped at 2am and i just laid on the ground accepting my fate
hotel checkout asked how was your stay and i said fine but my eyes said everything
jet lag insomnia + hotel bible = i now have theological questions at 3am
cruise ship port day and 3000 people descend on one beach town like a polite invasion
the travel vlogger said bali is cheap. my bank account determined that was a lie
left my charger at the hotel and didnt realize til 200 miles later. phone died at 4%
airport lounge access changed me. i can never go back to sitting on the floor by the outlet
tried to use my high school spanish in mexico and the waiter switched to english immediately
the train in europe was so smooth i forgot what american amtrak did to me
travel hack influencers be like 'fly free with this one trick' and the trick is credit card debt
our campfire set off a smoke alarm we didnt know existed in the woods. rangers were not amused
luggage carousel is just adult musical chairs but everyone loses
